hero.name: Beijia Huang
hero.title: AI Agent Engineer & Independent Developer
hero.intro: Computer science student from Central South University. Focus on learning cutting-edge AI agent technology and multi-field knowledge.

about: I am a third-year undergraduate student majoring in Computer Science and Technology at Central South University. I have a strong interest and enthusiasm for AI agent technology. I am also very eager to learn knowledge in multiple fields to make myself more fulfilling, confident and calm.
My dream is to measure the world with my feet and appreciate the beautiful scenery everywhere in the world with my eyes.
